webhook-url.name: Webhook URL
webhook-url.description: Your Discord webhook URL. Leave empty to disable all notifications.

webhook-username.name: Webhook Display Name
webhook-username.description: The name shown as the sender in Discord.

notify-game-open.name: Notify on Game Open
notify-game-open.description: Send a message when the main menu is first reached.

notify-play-level.name: Notify on Playing a Level
notify-play-level.description: Send a message when entering a level.

notify-editor.name: Notify on Opening the Editor
notify-editor.description: Send a message when opening the level editor.

notify-level-complete.name: Notify on Level Complete
notify-level-complete.description: Send a message when a level is completed.
